mapper.select: select ${columnName},company_code from ${tableName} where DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) order by time asc

select value,index_code,time,uidentify from ${tableName} where index_code like CONCAT('%',#{prefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

select value,index_code,time,uidentify from ${tableName} where index_code like CONCAT('%',#{prefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
select count(*) from ${tableName} where DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

select count(*) from ${tableName} where DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE(uptime) >= DATE(#{uptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
